arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the DB proxy.

auth.description: Details of the authentication configuration for the DB proxy.

debug_logging.description: Indicates whether debug logging is enabled for the DB proxy.

endpoint.description: The connection endpoint for the DB proxy.

engine_family.description: The database engine family that the proxy supports.

id.description: The identifier for the DB proxy.

idle_client_timeout.description: The time, in seconds, that a client connection can be idle before the proxy disconnects it.

require_tls.description: Indicates whether TLS is required for connections to the DB proxy.

role_arn.description: The ARN of the IAM role associated with the DB proxy.

vpc_id.description: The VPC ID associated with the DB proxy.

vpc_security_group_ids.description: The IDs of the VPC security groups associated with the DB proxy.

vpc_subnet_ids.description: The IDs of the VPC subnets associated with the DB proxy.
